title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLIX. Relics.
content:
As I went over the water,
            The water went over me,
        I heard an old woman crying,
            Will you buy some furmity?
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXLIX. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
